hero.label: Premium Chauffeur Service
hero.title: Luxury Airport
hero.subtitle: Arriving or departing from Yaoundé and Douala — we handle your transfer between the airport and your hotel or destination with comfort, punctuality, and elegance.

comfort.description: Travel in style aboard our premium SUV fleet. Lexus LX, Toyota Land Cruiser, and Jeep Grand Cherokee — the perfect balance between comfort and distinction.

comfortPlus.description: For those who accept nothing less than extraordinary. The Mercedes-Benz S-Class and ultra-premium vehicles offer an unrivalled arrival statement.

drivers.title: Professional Chauffeurs
drivers.description: Each chauffeur is rigorously selected, trained in VIP protocol, and committed to respecting your privacy.

tracking.title: Real-Time Transfer Tracking
tracking.description: We monitor your transfer live. Delay or early arrival — we adapt so you never have to wait.

availability.title: Available 24/7
availability.description: Day and night, all year round. Whether it's a late arrival or a dawn departure, we are always there.

luxury.title: An Unmatched Luxury Experience
luxury.description: From chilled water to perfect air conditioning, every detail is carefully considered so that your journey is as exceptional as your destination.

step1.title: Book Online
step1.description: Fill in the booking form in just a few clicks with your route, date, and time. We confirm within minutes.

step2.title: Confirmation & Reminder
step2.description: Receive immediate confirmation by email along with a reminder 24 hours before your transfer.

step3.title: Airport Welcome
step3.description: Your chauffeur awaits you at the arrivals exit with a sign bearing your name.

step4.title: Direct Transfer
step4.description: Head to your hotel, apartment, or airport in complete serenity, comfort, and elegance.

booking.title: Book Your Transfer
booking.subtitle: Quick form in just a few steps.

step7.title: Summary
step7.name: Name
step7.paymentOptions: Options: PayPal · Orange Money · MTN MoMo
step7.paymentNote: The balance is payable in cash or mobile money on site. Free cancellation up to 48 hours before. After this period or no-show = non-refundable deposit.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: About Us
about.paragraph1: Born from a passion for excellence and Cameroonian hospitality, Royal Drive Cameroon is the benchmark for premium airport transfers in Douala and Yaoundé.
about.paragraph2: Our promise is simple: to offer every traveller a royal welcome, from the moment they step off the plane to their final destination. Our professional chauffeurs, impeccably maintained vehicles, and commitment to punctuality make every journey a memorable experience.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: A question or special request? Our team is here for you.

footer.tagline: Premium private airport transfer service in Cameroon. Precision, discretion, and elegance on every journey.
footer.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to book a transfer with Royal Drive Cameroon.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I would like to book a transfer with Royal Drive Cameroon.
